description: Style Notecatwalk takes the sandal trend a notch higher with this pair. Wear this lovely versatile pair with harem pants, denims or leggings and look perfect. This pair is designed to Fit your foot snugly without making it seem bulky. Grab them before its too late!Product DetailsForefoot and midfoot straps connected by a braided strap has rivet details on the strapsMini wedge stylingA padded and curved footbedTPU outsole with a grooved heel patchMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
